query:
SELECT pbi.id, pbi.worker_id, pbi.base_amount, pbi.total_deductions, pbi.total_bonuses, pbi.net_amount, pbi.days_worked 
FROM payroll_batch_items pbi 
JOIN payroll_batches pb ON pbi.batch_id = pb.id 
WHERE pb.batch_code = 'Batch-2026-02-001' 
ORDER BY pbi.worker_id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT pbi.id, pbi.worker_id, pbi.base_amount, pbi.total_deductions, pbi.total_bonuses, pbi.net_amount, pbi.days_worked 
FROM payroll_batch_items pbi 
JOIN payroll_batches pb ON pbi.batch_id = pb.id 
WHERE pb.batch_code = 'Batch-2026-02-001' 
ORDER BY pbi.worker_id;
